trigger_queries.query: I need to investigate why the delegation system is failing. Load the right hm skills for me.
assertions: Classifies as Debug domain (primary signal: 'failing')
Routes to hm-l2-debug + hm-l2-completion-looping
Notes research overlap: hm-l3-detective available if investigation needed
Stays within 3-skill limit

trigger_queries.query: Load skills for implementing phase 5 of the authentication module.
assertions: Classifies as Implementation domain
Routes to hm-l2-phase-execution as primary
Adds hm-l2-cross-cutting-change if touching multiple layers
Provides loading order with depth-qualified names

trigger_queries.query: I need to set up a phase loop with entry gates and exit criteria for the authentication module.
assertions: Classifies as Guardrail domain (signals: 'phase loop', 'entry gates', 'exit criteria')
Routes to hm-l2-phase-loop + hm-l2-completion-looping
Provides loading order: phase-loop first, then completion-looping

trigger_queries.query: Run the full research chain: ingest the tech stack docs, detect patterns in the codebase, then synthesize findings.
assertions: Classifies as Research Chain domain (signals: 'research chain', 'ingest', 'detect', 'synthesize')
Routes to hm-l3-research-chain + hm-l3-synthesis
All names use l3 depth qualification

trigger_queries.query: Create a new skill for managing WebSocket connections.
assertions: Detects meta-builder intent (signal: 'create a new skill')
Routes to hf-l2-skill-router instead of hm-* skills
Does NOT load any hm-* skill bundle
Explains boundary: hm-l2-skill-router handles product-dev tasks only

trigger_queries.query: We're about to ship. Review the phase output and check the evidence gate.
assertions: Classifies as Review domain (signals: 'ship', 'review', 'evidence gate')
Routes to hm-l2-production-readiness + gate-l3-evidence-truth
Includes gate-* skill for terminal evidence verification
Max 3 skill limit not exceeded

rich_source_evidence.claim: Task-to-skill routing with 12 domain bundles using depth-qualified names
rich_source_evidence.evidence: SKILL.md defines 12 domains with 1-3 skills each. Max 3 per bundle enforced by Iron Law. All names use {lineage}-{depth}-{name} format.

rich_source_evidence.claim: Multiple routing strategies for task classification
rich_source_evidence.evidence: Single-domain routing, multi-domain resolution (primary + secondary add), 3+ domain split. Intent signal matching per domain.

rich_source_evidence.claim: Cross-references to 7 sibling skills + 12 domain-referenced skills
rich_source_evidence.evidence: 7 skills in Cross-References table (hm-l2-lineage-router, hm-coord-loop, hm-l2-phase-execution, hm-l2-subagent-delegation-patterns, hf-l2-skill-router, hm-l2-gate-orchestrator, gate-l3-evidence-truth). 19 skill references across 12 domains.

rich_source_evidence.claim: Structured routing with decision tree and loading rules
rich_source_evidence.evidence: 6 loading rules. Multi-domain resolution decision tree. Domain-to-lineage routing chain. Domain overlap resolution protocol.
SKILL.md (dispatch map + loading rules) + references/routing-map.md (detailed signal tables, multi-domain combos, exclusion rules).

rich_source_evidence.claim: Works across project types and task scales
rich_source_evidence.evidence: Domain-based routing adapts to any project. Multi-domain resolution handles complex tasks. 3-skill limit prevents overload. Depth-qualified names ensure correct file resolution.
Self-correction documents 4 anti-patterns. Multi-domain limit honestly documented. Wrong Router pattern routes to sibling hf-l2-skill-router.

rich_source_evidence.claim: This evals file + metrics scorecard on disk
rich_source_evidence.evidence: 6 eval scenarios (3 positive, 1 negative, 2 boundary). metrics/rich-gate-scorecard.md with D1-D8 scoring.
